def positive_python_perf_layer_memory_allocation_temporary_dataframe_created_per_row():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_memory_allocation_temporary_dataframe_created_per_row"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag DataFrame construction per row or per record instead of vectorized batch construction."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
